title: Gemma 4 E2B Victim Vision LoRA — C2A Disaster
subtitle: Gemma 4 E2B fine-tuned on C2A for victim detection in disaster aerial imagery
description: Vision LoRA adapter for Gemma 4 E2B trained on the C2A (Combination to Application) dataset (rgbnihal/c2a-dataset) for human/victim detection in UAV disaster imagery. Output schema is a JSON envelope with finding_type, confidence, visual_evidence — directly maps to FieldAgent's report_finding function call. Produced by FieldAgent / Gemma-Guardian for the Gemma 4 Good Hackathon (May 2026) GATE 3 acceptance test (3/3 victim trigger on placeholder_victim_01.jpg). Load via the bundled qasim_inference.py (PEFT + base + adapter).
